Created attachment 184168
postgresql-odbc_fdw.shar

This PostgreSQL extension implements a Foreign Data Wrapper (FDW) for remote
databases using Open Database Connectivity ODBC.

WWW: https://github.com/CartoDB/odbc_fdw
